title: Access the Building Overview Screen and View Area Status
summary: Open the Building Overview HMI screen by pressing OVERVIEW, then use the screen to view the layout of the entire facility and the color-coded status of each area.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to access the Building Overview HMI screen to view the facility-wide layout and observe the color-coded status shown for each area.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to interpret the meaning of displayed colors unless a source-backed legend or status mapping is available.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Building Overview screen from the HMI and observe the facility layout and area-level color-coded status.

safety_notes: This procedure is documented as an HMI viewing/navigation action only.
Do not assign meaning to the displayed colors unless a source-backed legend or status mapping is available.

visual_references.description: Building Overview HMI screen showing the facility layout and color-coded status by area.
Related HMI screen context on the same manual page where Building Overview navigation is referenced.
Legend artifact for a different overview screen; not a confirmed legend for Building Overview color meanings.

steps.title: Press OVERVIEW from the HMI
steps.instruction: From the HMI, press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen.
steps.expected_result: The system opens the Building Overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The Building Overview screen becomes accessible after pressing OVERVIEW.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing OVERVIEW does not open the Building Overview screen.

actions.label: Open Building Overview
actions.exact_action: Press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference image of the Building Overview screen that is opened by pressing OVERVIEW.
Related HMI context from the same manual page where overview navigation is discussed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Building Overview screen cannot be accessed by pressing OVERVIEW.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen.

steps.title: Confirm the Building Overview screen is displayed
steps.purpose: Verify that the correct HMI screen has been opened.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the "Building Overview" screen is displayed.
steps.expected_result: The displayed screen is the Building Overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shown matches the Building Overview display for the facility.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed screen is not the Building Overview screen or the screen does not load.

actions.label: Verify displayed screen
actions.exact_action: Confirm that the "Building Overview" screen is displayed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Compare the displayed HMI to the Building Overview screen layout shown in Figure 4-3.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the expected Building Overview screen is not displayed after pressing OVERVIEW.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen. The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility and a color-coded status of each area.

steps.title: View the facility layout
steps.purpose: Use the Building Overview screen to see the layout of the entire facility.
steps.instruction: View the layout of the entire facility shown on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The operator can see the facility-wide layout on the Building Overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The full facility layout is visible on the Building Overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The facility layout is not visible or is incomplete on the displayed screen.

actions.label: Review facility layout
actions.exact_action: View the layout of the entire facility shown on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The facility layout presented on the Building Overview screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Building Overview screen does not show the layout of the entire facility.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility.

steps.title: Observe area color-coded status
steps.purpose: Use the Building Overview screen to observe the status shown for each area.
steps.instruction: Observe the color-coded status shown for each area on the screen.
steps.expected_result: The operator can see a color-coded status for each area on the Building Overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Each area displays a visible color-coded status on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: Area status is not visible, is missing, or cannot be observed on the screen.

actions.label: Observe area status
actions.exact_action: Observe the color-coded status shown for each area on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Area-level color-coded status indicators shown on the Building Overview screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if area-level color-coded status is not visible on the Building Overview screen.
Stop and do not assign meaning to the displayed colors unless a source-backed legend or status mapping is available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Building Overview" screen shows ... a color-coded status of each area.
The source states that the screen shows color-coded status for each area, but it does not provide the meaning of the colors in this section.

success_criteria: The Building Overview screen is displayed.
The operator can see the layout of the entire facility.
The operator can observe the color-coded status of each area.
healthy_conditions: Pressing OVERVIEW opens the Building Overview screen.
The Building Overview screen shows the layout of the entire facility.
The Building Overview screen shows a color-coded status for each area.
failure_conditions: The Building Overview screen cannot be accessed by pressing OVERVIEW.
The expected Building Overview screen does not display.
The facility layout is not visible on the screen.
Area-level color-coded status is not visible on the screen.
The source section does not provide a legend or status mapping for interpreting the displayed colors.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the Building Overview screen cannot be accessed by pressing OVERVIEW.
Escalate if the expected Building Overview screen does not display or does not show the facility layout and area status.
Do not interpret displayed colors beyond noting their presence unless a source-backed legend or status mapping is available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Building Overview screen showing the facility layout and color-coded area status.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Press OVERVIEW to access the "Building Overview" screen. The "Building Overview" screen shows the layout of the entire facility and a color-coded status of each area.

missing_details: The source does not provide the meaning of the colors shown on the Building Overview screen in this section.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
The source does not define additional supporting roles or approval requirements.
